# Current President of Sri Lanka (as of 2026-04-29)

Executive Summary
- The current President of Sri Lanka is Anura Kumara Dissanayake. He assumed office in 2024 and serves as the head of state and government in Sri Lanka.

Key Facts
- Full name: Anura Kumara Dissanayake
- Title: President of Sri Lanka
- Start of term: 2024
- Approximate start date: 22-23 September 2024 (gazette 23 Sep 2024)

Source
- Parliament of Sri Lanka - Heads of State: https://www.parliament.lk/en/learn/handbook-of-parliament/heads-of-state
